creator: dev2@heesakkers.info
text:
Version 0.18.1 of Merkaartor has been released. 0.18.0 was released earlier, but had problems.

I built this version with gdal 1.9.1, 1.9.0 should work equally well.

Full list of changes in this patch:
- Update to 0.18.1
- Convert to new OPTIONS system
- Appease portlint by maintaining my own download location in MASTER_SITES
- Appease portlint by removing ABI version number for exiv2
- Specify RELEASE=1 in QMAKEFLAGS to cosmetically fix the about dialog.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
